prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: small green rubber sphere
  - obj_1: small brown rubber sphere
  - obj_2: small cyan rubber sphere
  - obj_3: large red rubber cylinder
  - obj_4: large red rubber cube
  - obj_5: large purple rubber cylinder
  - obj_6: large brown metal cylinder
  - obj_7: small cyan rubber sphere

Questions:
[qrr_0021] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0022] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0023] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0024] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0025] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0026] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0027] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0028] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0029] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0030] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_2. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0031] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0032] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0033] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0034] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0035] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0036] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0037] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0038] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0039] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0040] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >

- obj_3 (large red rubber cylinder): back-left area
- obj_4 (large red rubber cube): back-right area
- obj_5 (large purple rubber cylinder): front-center area
- obj_6 (large brown metal cylinder): right side
- obj_7 (small cyan rubber sphere): back area, behind red cylinder
